EXCLUSIVE: Vivani Medical Initiates First Human Clinical Trial With GLP-1 Implant For Weight Loss In Australia
data.description: Vivani Medical launches first-in-human trial of its exenatide implant in Australia, aiming to support chronic weight management with innovative GLP-1 technology.

data.title: Lamb Weston Takes A Hit From High Manufacturing Costs And Softer Volumes, Expects Challenging Conditions Till 2026
data.description: Lamb Weston shares drop 19.5% after Q2 earnings miss, lower revenues, and a reduced FY25 outlook.
